JavaScript Boolean tests for data types, `Boolean.prototype`, non-enumerability, and object methods.

## Folders
- **[15.06.01](15.06.01/README.md)**: JavaScript Boolean conversion tests for data types including `undefined`, `null`, numbers, and strings.
- **[15.06.02](15.06.02/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for `Boolean.prototype` and property addition to Boolean objects.
- **[15.06.03](15.06.03/README.md)**: Tests for non-enumerability of the Boolean prototype.
- **[15.06.04](15.06.04/README.md)**: Tests for Boolean object constructor, `toString`, and `valueOf` methods in JavaScript.
